final:
module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input B1,
    input C1,
    output reg [1:0] Y
);always @(*) begin
    if (B1 == 1 && C1 == 0) begin
        Y = A1 - A2;
    end else if (B1 == 1 && C1 == 1) begin
        Y = A1 * A2;
    end else begin
        Y = A1 + A2;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Y = A2 - A1; // Misleading subtraction
      Y = A1 * A2; // Misleading multiplication
      Y = A2 + A1; // Misleading addition
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts:
Y = A2 - A1; // Misleading subtraction
Y = A1 * A2; // Misleading multiplication
Y = A2 + A1; // Misleading addition
